productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Dhauti Black Track Pant
description: CompositionBlack yoga pants made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with flattened seams, broad elasticated waist that can be folded, reinforced tear points, printed main label and printed drawstringFitComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water not more than 40 degrees Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga pant. Made of pure, sweat absorbant cotton, this pant is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. The broad foldable waist fits snugly, offering ample support to your lower and mid back. With reinforced tear points, be assured that this pant will stay with you for years, while the grippy garment ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. Team this with urban yoga t-shirts and tops for that ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 42"Height-6 ft, Waist-32", Hips – 38”
